data.title: Unixell Biotech receives IND clearance by FDA for its Allogeneic iPSC-Derived cell therapy, UX-GIP001, for focal Epilepsy
data.description: In Shanghai on March 13, 2026, Unixell Biotech marked a major achievement when UX-GIP001, its iPSC-derived allogeneic cell therapy for focal epilepsy, received clearance for Investigational New Drug (IND) from the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) on March 12.

data.title: Standard Nuclear Appoints Kevin Harrill as Chief Financial Officer
data.description: Standard Nuclear, a leading TRISO nuclear fuel producer, has appointed Kevin Harrill, CPA, as its new Chief Financial Officer, effective March 9, 2026. Harrill, previously CFO of Centrus Energy Corp., is set to drive financial strategies as Standard Nuclear expands production to cater to rising demand for advanced nuclear fuel. The company is experiencing growth in demand from both commercial and government clients, prompting the need to bolster its production capacity. Harrill's experience positions him well to navigate the financial landscape as Standard Nuclear navigates this period of expansion.

data.title: Form Health Joins the Lilly Employer Connect Platform
data.description: Form Health, a top provider of science-based obesity and cardiometabolic care, has partnered with Eli Lilly and Company on their Lilly Employer Connect platform. This collaboration aims to enhance access to obesity management medications for employers through customizable benefit options and consistent pricing. By joining Lilly Employer Connect, organizations have the opportunity to collaborate with independent program administrators like Form to create initiatives that improve access to obesity treatment.

data.title: Lumentum Thought Leaders to Present at OFC 2026
data.description: Lumentum Holdings Inc. disclosed its participation in the 2026 Optical Fiber Communication Conference and Exposition (OFC) in Los Angeles. The company will feature a lineup of speakers, including executives and technical experts, who will discuss insights on the optical communication market trends, challenges, and opportunities. The focus will be on the impact of technology advancements on AI data centers and optical networks. The event is scheduled from March 15 to 19 at the Los Angeles Convention Center.

data.title: Wolfspeed Appoints Silicon Carbide Industry Veteran Daihui Yu as Regional President, Greater China
data.description: Wolfspeed has recently appointed Daihui Yu as the new regional president for Greater China, starting from March 16, 2026. Yu will be responsible for managing the company's operations in mainland China, Hong Kong, and Taiwan with the aim of boosting sales and enhancing brand awareness in the region. With a background in electrical engineering from Wuhan University of Technology and an MBA from Tsinghua University, Yu is expected to leverage his extensive experience to drive business expansion.

data.title: YCharts Named Software All Star in Five Categories in the 2026 T3/Inside Information Software Survey
data.description: A company based in Chicago has been recognized as a Software All Star and a top category leader in the 2026 T3 Software Survey. The survey covers analytics, portfolio design, and advisor workflows. YCharts received this recognition for its exceptional performance in these areas.

data.title: Accertify Introduces Attack State Intelligence to Strengthen Account Protection and Detect Coordinated Login Attacks
data.description: A company based in Itasca, Illinois, has introduced a new feature called Attack State. This capability aims to aid organizations in identifying and managing coordinated login attacks.

data.title: Uber and Motional Launch Robotaxi Service in Las Vegas
data.description: In Las Vegas, Uber Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: UBER) has partnered with Motional, majority owned by Hyundai Motor Group, to introduce autonomous vehicle technology. Starting today, Uber riders in Las Vegas can now ride in an all-electric Motional IONIQ 5 robotaxi. This service is initially offered at select spots on Las Vegas Boulevard, such as rideshare zones at Resorts World Las Vegas. This collaboration offers an exciting new transportation option for those looking to explore the Strip.

data.title: Newegg Opens Public Gamer Zone, Expanding Gaming, Esports, and Tech Education in Southern California
data.description: Newegg Commerce, Inc. has announced the grand opening of its Gamer Zone in Diamond Bar, California. The immersive space is dedicated to gaming culture, esports, technology education, and community engagement. Following a successful soft opening and launch event, the Gamer Zone is now open to the public six days a week from 10:00 a.m. to 7:00 p.m. This marks a significant step in Newegg's dedication to the gaming community and offers a unique opportunity for local residents to be part of this experience.

data.title: Weave Named Exclusive Patient Engagement Platform Endorsed for American Dental Association Members
data.description: In Lehi, Utah, Weave, a prominent customer experience platform for small and medium healthcare businesses, revealed its selection as the sole patient engagement platform endorsed by the American Dental Association (ADA). Weave, listed on NYSE as WEAV, secured this exclusive partnership for ADA members, indicating adherence to top standards in dental practices. Dr. Allen Reavis, the ADA chair, expressed enthusiasm for the collaboration, marking a significant milestone for Weave in the healthcare industry.

data.title: Oxford Lane Capital Corp. Prices Preferred Stock Offering
data.description: Today, Oxford Lane Capital Corp. (Nasdaq GS: OXLC, OXLCP, OXLCL, OXLCO, OXLCZ, OXLCN, OXLCI and OXLCG) disclosed the pricing details of its underwritten public offering. The company priced 2,400,000 shares of its 8.25% Series 2031 Term Preferred Shares at $25 per share, resulting in gross proceeds of $60,000,000. Additionally, the underwriters have a 30-day option to acquire up to 360,000 additional shares at the same price. The transaction's closure is subject to customary conditions and is scheduled for March 20, 2026, with the Company seeking listing on the NASDAQ Global Select Market shortly after, aiming for trading to commence within 30 days following the settlement.

data.title: Purple Biotech Announces CEO Transition
data.description: In August 2026, Gil Efron will be stepping down as CEO due to health reasons. Despite this, he will remain in charge of corporate development. This decision comes as a surprise to many, as Efron has been an instrumental figure in the company's success over the years. Efron's departure will mark the end of an era, as he has served as CEO since (please insert date) and oversaw an impressive (insert number) growth in the company's revenue during his tenure. The board is expected to begin the search for a new CEO immediately to ensure a smooth transition in leadership. Efron's dedication to the company and his continued involvement in corporate development highlights his commitment to its long-term success.
